'''âzh-dh-l''' ('''kazhadhal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poohpooh|poohpooh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poohpooh|poohpooh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazhadhal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhadhal|thizhadhal]] || [[word:jizhadhal|jizhadhal]] || [[word:shizhadhal|shizhadhal]] || [[word:kizhadhal|kizhadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhadhal|thuthuzhadhal]] || [[word:jujuzhadhal|jujuzhadhal]] || [[word:shushuzhadhal|shushuzhadhal]] || [[word:kukuzhadhal|kukuzhadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhadhal|thuzhadhal]] || [[word:juzhadhal|juzhadhal]] || [[word:shuzhadhal|shuzhadhal]] || [[word:kuzhadhal|kuzhadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhadhal|thuzhadhal]] || [[word:juzhadhal|juzhadhal]] || [[word:shuzhadhal|shuzhadhal]] || [[word:kuzhadhal|kuzhadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhadhal|thezhadhal]] || [[word:jezhadhal|jezhadhal]] || [[word:shezhadhal|shezhadhal]] || [[word:kezhadhal|kezhadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhadhal|thothozhadhal]] || [[word:jojozhadhal|jojozhadhal]] || [[word:shoshozhadhal|shoshozhadhal]] || [[word:kokozhadhal|kokozhadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhadhal|thozhadhal]] || [[word:jozhadhal|jozhadhal]] || [[word:shozhadhal|shozhadhal]] || [[word:kozhadhal|kozhadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhadhal|thozhadhal]] || [[word:jozhadhal|jozhadhal]] || [[word:shozhadhal|shozhadhal]] || [[word:kozhadhal|kozhadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhadhal|thĂŠzhadhal]] || [[word:jĂŠzhadhal|jĂŠzhadhal]] || [[word:shĂŠzhadhal|shĂŠzhadhal]] || [[word:kĂŠzhadhal|kĂŠzhadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhadhal|thathazhadhal]] || [[word:jajazhadhal|jajazhadhal]] || [[word:shashazhadhal|shashazhadhal]] || [[word:kakazhadhal|kakazhadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhadhal|thazhadhal]] || [[word:jazhadhal|jazhadhal]] || [[word:shazhadhal|shazhadhal]] || [[word:kazhadhal|kazhadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhadhal|thazhadhal]] || [[word:jazhadhal|jazhadhal]] || [[word:shazhadhal|shazhadhal]] || [[word:kazhadhal|kazhadhal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhadhal|shazhadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhadhal|goshazhadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhadhal|gokishazhadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhalnĂŒ|shazhadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnknĂŒ|goshazhadhalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalnĂŒ|gokishazhadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhadhalshĂ«|shazhadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkshĂ«|goshazhadhalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalshĂ«|gokishazhadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhalro|shazhadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkro|goshazhadhalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalro|gokishazhadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhalmu|shazhadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkmu|goshazhadhalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalmu|gokishazhadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhadhalsher|shazhadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnksher|goshazhadhalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalsher|gokishazhadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhadhalng|shazhadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkng|goshazhadhalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalng|gokishazhadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhadhalya|shazhadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkya|goshazhadhalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalya|gokishazhadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhadhalyam|shazhadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkyam|goshazhadhalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalyam|gokishazhadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhalnĂŒshĂ«|shazhadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhadhalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhalnĂŒro|shazhadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnknĂŒro|goshazhadhalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalnĂŒro|gokishazhadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhalnĂŒmu|shazhadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnknĂŒmu|goshazhadhalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalnĂŒmu|gokishazhadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhalshĂ«ro|shazhadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkshĂ«ro|goshazhadhalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalshĂ«ro|gokishazhadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhalshĂ«mu|shazhadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkshĂ«mu|goshazhadhalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalshĂ«mu|gokishazhadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhalronĂŒ|shazhadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkronĂŒ|goshazhadhalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalronĂŒ|gokishazhadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhalroshĂ«|shazhadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkroshĂ«|goshazhadhalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalroshĂ«|gokishazhadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhalromu|shazhadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkromu|goshazhadhalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalromu|gokishazhadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhalmunĂŒ|shazhadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkmunĂŒ|goshazhadhalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalmunĂŒ|gokishazhadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhalmushĂ«|shazhadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkmushĂ«|goshazhadhalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalmushĂ«|gokishazhadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhalmuro|shazhadhalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhalnkmuro|goshazhadhalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhalmuro|gokishazhadhalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
